name: Easy Country Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a large mixer bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy. Add the cream of tartar and continue to beat until stiff peaks form when the beater is raised; set aside.
3. In another bowl, beat the egg yolks on high speed for 1 minute. Add the sugar, salt, lemon juice, and rind, and beat on high speed for 5 minutes longer.
4. By hand, fold the cake flour quickly into the egg yolks, about 15 strokes.
5. Add about one-third of the whites to the egg-yolk mixture and, with a large rubber spatula, fold until incorporated.
6. Gently fold in the remaining whites in 2 batches. A few patches of white will still be visible.
7. Transfer the batter to an ungreased 10-inch tube pan and bake for 40 minutes. The top should be golden brown.
8. Remove the cake to a rack to cool for 1 hour.
9. Loosen the sides with a knife and separate the center of the pan from the sides. Then loosen the bottom of the cake from the pan with a knife and tip it out onto a rack.
10. Let the cake cool completely before serving or storing.
